title: Descope Agentic Identity Hub for Startups ($10k in Descope Credits)
description: Descope is the leading identity platform for AI-native applications, purpose-built to secure the next generation of agentic workflows, MCP servers, and AI agents. Descope’s Agentic Identity Hub gives agents portable, revocable identities independent of platform or downstream authentication requirements - so your agents stay secure and in control at every step.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Descope Agentic Identity Hub for Startups ($10k in Descope Credits)
